response.justification: Bogdan has genuine depth across many engineering domains with 16+ years of experience, including high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s) and current AI tooling contributions at Naver. However, the role's core requirements — experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, feature flighting, A/B testing frameworks, bias detection, and rollout-risk management — are entirely absent from the resume. This is a specialized IC6 role demanding a proven track record in growth and experimentation systems, and there is no signal that Bogdan has operated in or led that domain. Broad generalist experience does not substitute for the deep vertical expertise this position requires.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Polyglot engineer with demonstrated proficiency across TypeScript, C#, Java, DLang, C++, and others, matching several required languages
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling at Naver shows relevance to AI-first engineering environments
concerns: Zero documented experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the central requirements of this role
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience; data aptitude appears limited to application-level work rather than instrumentation systems
Resume trajectory is generalist full-stack rather than the deep platform-engineering specialization expected at Principal/IC6 level for a growth systems role
